item.title: Hollow Knight: Silksong
item.description: Stunningly beautiful but unforgiving at times. Might be my favourite game of the year.

item.title: Nine Sols
item.description: Played this right after Silksong. Absolute banger of a game with the most satisfying combat mechanics.

item.title: Season of KDE Status Update #1
item.description: SoK status update on adding font subsetting to Okular, covering how fonts work and getting HarfBuzz set up with Poppler.

item.title: The Bookbot Situation
item.description:
This is going to be a relatively short post as I am writing this to shed light on the situation of a bot I built a few years ago called BookBot.

Current Situation

As part of Discord’s safety policy, verified bots have to be periodically re-verified. The last time the bot was verified was 3 years ago. It used to be added to around ~2850 servers and actively running before Discord enforced re-verification.

item.title: Hyperbola Quintessence in Rust
item.description: Generating sliding piece attacks for rooks, bishops and queens with hyperbola quintessence.

item.title: Bitboards in Rust
item.description: Representing the pieces of a chess board as bitboards (using 64-bit integers) and using them to generate piece attacks.

item.title: Yew.rs With TailwindCSS
item.description: Setting up Yew.rs with TailwindCSS to build a web frontend in Rust using WASM.

item.title: Switching to Wayland
item.description: Switching from X11 to Wayland and finding a Wayland replacement for each part of the old setup.

item.title: Writing a Build Automation Tool
item.description: Building Baker, a build automation tool written in Rust that uses TOML for configuration.

item.title: FEN String Parsing in Rust
item.description: Breaking down a FEN string and parsing it into a usable game state for a chess engine.

item.title: A brief recap of my Linux journey up until now
item.description: Recap of my Linux journey, from starting out on Pop!_OS to ending up on Arch Linux.
